title: Quality of Vanilla
description: QoL mods, Shaders and Resource packs. Everything for a best gaming experience
body:
# Quality of Vanilla

[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b355c1a2e1ea8d23fe029d6b22d8d78d4b1fbdac.png)](https://boosty.to/wizared)
[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0690500eff780f232b65ced58c6700f5745bf4fd.png)](https://discord.gg/gcc7yz36dn)
[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b41536f7223b6a0cd5bea478414088433cc2d3f.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/wizared/projects)

## About

### Idea
The main idea was to create a universal and convenient modpack that's great for simple vanilla survival and can also serve as a base for adding big server-side mods.

### Performance
Quality of Vanilla is indeed fast, but don't expect exceptional FPS. It's high, but not suitable for microwave, as the modpack contains 100+ mods and requires 6000 MB of RAM for a comfortable gaming experience.
![ ](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYWlzd2hoZTAwMWV2dHlyZ2tyaGNvaXRlY3BtcTlwZXVuYTYyZWFjNSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Z2UrUquyiJwze/giphy.webp)

### Quality of Life
The modpack includes a large number of well-configured QoL mods, such as AppleSkin, Inventory Sorting, BetterF3, EMI, and more. These mods enhance comfort and expand possibilities.
![ ](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYnNtazNmenkzdWRiOTQwemYybHlkN2lsdngydXlqa2I2NWYzc2F5dyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/l0HlPtbGpcnqa0fja/giphy.webp)

### Multiplayer
The entire modpack is client-side, meaning if you're hosting a multiplayer game, your friend on pure vanilla can still join you. Mods like Emotecraft, Emoji Type, and Show Me Your Skin! will make the multiplayer experience outstanding. Also CIT Resewn will allow you to experiment with resource packs.
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb2f8cd8d41255f038bccb3afafef7a595745389.png)


## Content & Credits

To open the desired resource in a new tab, click on it with the mouse wheel.

## What you shoud download

These materials are very cool, however due to copyright I can't pre-install them.

## Permits for use

<details>
